    P

    parse(List) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.IParser
    Parses a list of tokens into a syntax tree.
    parseConfig(Document) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.IConfigParser
    Parses the given configuration document.
    ParsingEvent<T> - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config
    Represents the result of parsing a configuration element.
    ParsingEvent(Element, T) - Constructor for record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.ParsingEvent
    Creates an instance of a ParsingEvent record class.
    programmeCounter() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Returns the value of the programmeCounter record component.
    prohibitInstructionHandler(Class) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.IInstructionSet
    Prohibits the use of a specific instruction handler.
    provideInput(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
    Provides input to the execution context.
